mission.title: envoy: http: configurable ignore of HTTP/1.1 upgrades
mission.description:
Fixes https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/issues/36305

Add configuration to ignore HTTP/1.1 Upgrade headers . See https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7230#section-6.7:

Risk Level: Medium
Testing: new unit tests
Docs Changes: in with APIs
Release Notes: inline

resolution.summary:
note: envoy maintainers will be mostly on vacation until 6th jan

/wait-any
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
